## Description
Wheat Kernels are&#10;&#9;&#9;seeds harvested from wheat crop. The kernel is the whole grain, made up of 3&#10;&#9;&#9;edible parts – bran, germ, and endosperm – protected by an inedible husk 

## Characteristics

| Attribute      | Value |
|--------:|:------|
|Edible:|false|
|Type:|Tissue|
|Form:|Solid|
